name: Kraut Burgers (Bierochen)
recipeInstructions:
Or substitute your favorite 2 loaf bread dough recipe.
1. Melt shortening in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the ground beef and chopped onions to the skillet. Cook until the meat is no longer pink, taking care not to brown it.
3. Stir in the cabbage and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Roll each loaf of bread dough once into a rectangle about 1/4-inch thick.
6. Cut each rectangle into 5-6 inch squares.
7. Place 2-3 tablespoons of the cabbage mixture onto each square, then fold and pinch the edges to seal.
8. Let the rolls rise for 20 minutes.
9. Brush tops with melted butter before baking.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
